mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, incident_id, comment_content, user_id, user_name, create_at FROM storage.incident_comment WHERE incident_id = #{incident_id} AND create_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY create_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO storage.incident_comment ( incident_id, comment_content, user_id, user_name ) VALUES ( #{incident_id}, #{comment_content}, #{user_id}, #{user_name} )
mapper.update: UPDATE storage.incident_comment SET comment_content = #{comment_content}, create_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{comment_id}
UPDATE storage.incident_comment SET comment_content = '삭제된 댓글입니다.', create_at = NULL WHERE comment_id = #{comment_id}
